title: Pacific Biosciences (PACB) Stock Forecast, Price Targets and Analysts Predictions
text: Based on analysis of 18 Wall Street analysts, PACB has a neutral consensus with a median price target of $3.00, ranging from $1.50 to $3.00. The average 12-month price target from 6 analysts is $2.50 USD, with a high estimate of $3 USD and a low estimate of $1 USD. PACB has 4 Buy ratings, 3 Hold ratings, and 1 Sell rating, with overall analyst rating of Buy (7.8/10). The company is expected to announce its next earnings report on 08/06/2026, with analysts projecting an EPS of -$0.13. PACB reported its most recent earnings on May 7, 2026 for Q1 2026, posting EPS of -$0.12, exceeding analysts' expectations of -$0.14 by 14.29%. Pacific Biosciences of California Inc is facing a negative outlook due to an anticipated decline in gross margins and concerns regarding stagnant utilization rates and weaker than expected demand for new instruments.
